utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Now check each for full specification: 1) destination: provided and specific (Bohemian Switzerland National Park, Czech Republic) — fully specified. 2) travel_dates: specific dates (September 25-29, 2024) — fully specified. 3) transportation: flight details with costs — flight route, airline, and cost provided; also local transport with type and cost — fully specified. 4) accommodation: hotel/hostel selection with location/type and cost — fully specified. 5) activities: selected activities listed, but no costs provided for activities — the format requires activities with costs, so this is not fully specified. 6) additional_services: insurance type and cost given — fully specified. 7) total_budget: breakdown includes multiple categories with amounts and total — fully specified. Therefore, 6 out of 7 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each item from the final package to the closest corresponding category/name in the ground-truth ratings. Destination: Bohemian Switzerland National Park (near Prague/Dresden) doesn't appear in the rated destinations list, so no destination rating can be mapped. Flights: Ryanair is a budget airline; the package uses Economy-like budget travel, so map to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class. Local transport: Regional Train Pass has no direct rating. Accommodation: 'Hřensko Adventure Hostel' 6-Bed Mixed Dormitory best maps to 'Backpacker's Base' (hostel-style, solo/budget). Activities: Hiking routes map to 'Hiking Expedition'. Photography locations are not listed as rated activities; no direct mapping. Additional services: 'Lightweight Adventure Shield' is travel insurance; no matching service in ratings. Budget line items mostly lack mappings. Therefore, only map the items that have explicit counterparts: Budget Airline Economy Class, Backpacker's Base, Hiking Expedition.
